response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a young person reclining with eyes closed and head angled upward. Strong directional light illuminates one side of the face while shadows obscure the other side and background. The subject wears a garment with gathered fabric and a tied bow at the neck. A hand is partially visible in the upper right corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a young person reclining with eyes closed and head angled upward, the top of the head cropped by the upper frame edge.
